title: PathSpec
description: A path pattern specification for auto-discovering structured data in object storage. Supports glob patterns to match files across directories without requiring a manifest file.

pathPattern.title: Path Pattern
pathPattern.description: Glob-style path pattern relative to bucket root. Use * for single-level wildcard and ** for recursive matching. Examples: data/*/events/*.parquet, logs/**/*.json

structureFormat.title: Structure Format
structureFormat.description: Expected file format for schema inference (e.g., parquet, csv, avro, json). If omitted, auto-detected from file extension.

separator.title: Separator
separator.description: For delimited files such as CSV, the separator character.

autoPartitionDetection.title: Auto Partition Detection
autoPartitionDetection.description: When enabled, automatically detects Hive-style partition columns from directory names (e.g., year=2024/month=01/).

containerFilterPattern.title: Container Filter Pattern
containerFilterPattern.description: Regex filter to include/exclude discovered containers by name.
